trigger.reason: Google announced agentic AI capabilities (Gemini-powered features across Android, Gboard dictation, vibe-coded widgets) and vertical-targeted legal AI tools from Anthropic, both meeting substance and attention criteria; Google's broad feature rollout poses highest market-moving risk to adjacent sectors.

primary_event.headline: Google brings agentic AI and vibe-coded widgets to Android at Android Show
primary_event.summary: Google announced major AI-first features including agentic Gemini capabilities across Android, Gemini-powered Gboard dictation with form-filling, and vibe-coded widget creation tools launching on Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones this summer. These represent significant capability expansions that could displace specialized third-party dictation and design automation tools.

secondary_events.headline: Anthropic launches AI legal services tools for law firms
Threads tests Meta AI integration similar to Grok for real-time trends
